---
title: "Projects"
---

# My Projects

## Featured Projects

### [Personal Website](projects/personal-website.qmd)
A Quarto-based personal site for projects, blog posts, and publications—with custom styling, search, and GitHub Pages deployment.

- **Technologies:** Quarto, HTML/CSS, R (optional), GitHub Actions
- **Repo:** [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/ztr_website)

### Project 2
[Description to come.]

- **Technologies used:** [List technologies]
- **GitHub:** [Link to repository]

### Project 3
[Description to come.]
